document.name: Szpünik Café
document.shortDescription: Daytime café inside Szimpla — brunch and espresso before the ruin bar opens in the Jewish Quarter.
document.longDescription:
Szpünik Café operates daytime hours within the Szimpla Kert complex on Kazinczy utca with coffee, breakfast, and light lunch. It is a quieter entry point to the Jewish Quarter's ruin gardens. Details via szimpla.hu.

Sources: https://szimpla.hu/szpunik
